title: Lightly Shattered Crunchy American Flour Hash
description: A nutty, shattering, and energizing American dish made with flour, featuring a brine-dried flavor and grilled on a Binchotan grill. This recipe is inspired by Ayurvedic and Sattvic principles.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and water to form a dough.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on the desired size of your hash.
Roll out each piece into a thin sheet, about 1/16 inch thick.
Brush the top of each sheet with coconut oil and sprinkle with nutmeg powder and black pepper.
Place the sheets on a Binchotan grill and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until lightly browned and crispy.
Remove the hash from the grill and let it cool for a few minutes.
Break the hash into shattering pieces and serve immediately.
